entity: BBR source abbreviation BRK maps to warehouse canonical BKN (Brooklyn Nets franchise, 1610612751)

query_target.sql: SELECT team_id, city, nickname, abbreviation, valid_from, valid_to, is_current FROM dim_team_history WHERE team_id = '1610612751' AND is_current

notes: BRK is the BBR source abbreviation for the Brooklyn Nets (used in scraped BBR roster pages for the franchise's 2012-13 only season); the warehouse canonical is BKN. dim_team_history is_current=true picks the modern era row.
